sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship movement (shmup paradigm)
special_mechanics.description: Scrolling shooter with player-controlled ship. No jump mechanics or gravity systems applicable.

special_mechanics.name: Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Hidden destructible tiles offer bonus points or weapon power-ups that modify player capabilities

special_mechanics.name: Proximity scoring
special_mechanics.description: Bonus points awarded for defeating enemy formations within certain proximity to player ship

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Star Soldier is a scrolling shmup (shoot-em-up), not a platformer. Wikipedia source provides game overview and series history but contains no movement physics, gravity, jump, or sub-pixel system documentation. Traditional platformer physics parameters are not applicable to this game genre.
